description: Output specification, field description and control (externally described)
help: Field description and control entries for an externally described file.

parameters.name: OUTIND
parameters.help: Indicators that condition output of this field (three sets).

parameters.name: FIELDNAME
parameters.help: The name of the field to write.

parameters.name: BLANKAFT
parameters.help: B = set the field to blanks or zeros after it is written.

parameters.name: COMMENT
parameters.help: The comment area of the specification (positions 81-100).
